title: QoS Classes and Kubelet Eviction Ordering
description: In this lab you will observe how pods with different QoS classifications behave when node memory pressure is simulated. You will inspect the QoS class assigned to running pods, identify which pods are at highest risk of eviction, and update resource configurations to ensure critical workloads receive Guaranteed QoS status. You will also examine kubelet eviction events to understand the decision-making process.
